steps.expected: Valid JSON with rows for python, javascript, typescript, rust

assertions.title: Harness loop benchmark completes full agent cycle

steps.observed: All 5 iteration rows have remaining_matches=0 and passed=true

evidence.details: iterations=5 (>= 5). all_passed=true. Each of 5 rows: search->plan->apply->verify cycle completed with remaining_matches=0. Phase medians: search=0.092s, plan=0.097s, apply=0.159s, verify=0.041s.

assertions.title: All benchmark scripts produce valid JSON artifacts

steps.expected: All parse successfully as valid JSON

steps.observed: All 5 artifacts contain suite and generated_at_epoch_s

evidence.details: bench_ast_multilang.json: suite=run_ast_multilang_benchmarks, epoch=1773637214.43. bench_rewrite_5k.json: suite=run_ast_rewrite_benchmarks, epoch=1773638326.48. bench_harness_loop.json: suite=run_harness_loop_benchmark, epoch=1773639441.87. bench_index_scaling.json: suite=run_index_scaling_benchmark, epoch=1773640164.65. bench_run_ast_benchmarks.json: suite=ast_search_benchmark_gate, epoch=1773590522.08.

assertions.title: No regression in existing AST benchmark baseline

evidence.details: AST benchmark ratio=2.688092 (threshold 3.0). tg_median=0.822317s, sg_median=0.305911s. passed=true. No regression detected.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. VAL-BENCH-004 (multi-lang AST) confirmed 4 languages with Python ratio 1.12. VAL-BENCH-005 (rewrite 5k) confirmed 5000 files with 3 phases. VAL-BENCH-006 (harness loop) confirmed 5 iterations all passed. VAL-BENCH-009 (valid JSON) confirmed all 5 artifacts have suite and epoch fields. VAL-BENCH-010 (no regression) confirmed AST ratio 2.69 <= 3.0.
